category_sources: source_facts.description says browser-based frontend to gdb; official gdbgui homepage describes it as a browser-based frontend to the GNU debugger.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name; official homepage title and docs use gdbgui.
docs_sources: Official gdbgui site provides home, guides, getting started, FAQ, and API/command-line reference pages.
repo_sources: Official gdbgui homepage lists GitHub distribution at https://github.com/cs01/gdbgui.
tags_sources: source_facts.description; official homepage says gdbgui supports breakpoints, stack traces, and debugging C, C++, Go, and Rust.
